title: stachys pauciflora
intro: Stachys pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered hedge nettle, is a perennial plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys pauciflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Stachys pauciflora is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve for wound care and skin issues.
